_comment: Configuration for thresholds and behaviour. Units: rain in mm per hour, wind/gust in mph. Adjust values to change colouring and chart marker.

rain._comment: Rain thresholds (mm per hour). green = zero, amber = <= amber, red = > amber

wind._comment: Wind (average) thresholds in mph. <green = green; <=amber = amber; >amber = red.

gust._comment: Gust thresholds in mph, same rules as wind.

conditions._comment: Condition thresholds used to compute overall condition displayed in the alert. Values are mph boundaries.

colors._comment: CSS class names used for condition badges and alert mapping. You can change these to different classes or hex-based classes if desired.
